replies.msg:
【台灣手足入】九月一齊齊去西門町鳩叫
https://lih.kg/1516812
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

身邊有隻山羊男：

大男人
有嘢會收埋唔講但想身邊嘅人識讀佢心鐘意強調默契
唔識表達自己，但睇得出內心世界好豐富
佢對你嘅關心其實藏咗喺細節位，所以同佢相處需要細心
自我中心，自私，唔識從人地角度出發因為慣咗所有人會就佢
唔識愛人
成日亂諗嘢過份解讀人地意思仲自己諗完當係真然後俾啲錯嘅反應你
物件著重實用性，啲嘢就算著/用咗好耐但未爛都會繼續用
懶
追你追到手嘅時候會覺得自己入咗comfort zone即刻好安心展示晒自己啲缺點出嚟然後嚇親人，我覺得佢只會對另一半係咁，佢就算好熟嘅朋友應該都未必會見到呢一面
好著重自己形象所以個人就算玩都唔會玩到好放
暗地裡個人好咸濕但為咗形象一定唔會表露出嚟
犯賤，所以唔可以對佢好/太好，佢點對你你點對佢就啱，同時唔可以俾佢stick喺comfort zone度覺得你一定唔會走
口是心非，其實係因為怕受傷害
一定要舔過嘢先會檢討吓自己
受軟唔受硬
內心其實係個細路
內斂怕醜，關係轉變需要慢慢嚟step by step
鐘意「特別」，對「平凡」興趣不大

replies.msg: My friend Tomiko is a Capricorn ♑️ Last Monday my girlfriend and I had supper at her house. Her younger brother got some Japanese homework to do. He said “I’ve got to do part A but haven’t got to do part B.” I said “I’ll leave you doing your prep.” He soaks up new vocabularies and grammar patterns very quickly. During japanese class he soaks up everything the teacher 👩🏻‍🏫 says. When he reads a novel he is like a sponge and soaks up the story. When he encounters a problem in his computer he’ll find John who’s an expert and soak the advice up he offers. His elder brother has a viola exam 🎻next week. After chatting with him in his room for a while, I said “I had better leave you to get on with your practice.” My wife too said “I’d better leave you to practise your exam pieces.” Some orange juice spilt down the chair onto the floor so Tomiko soaked it up with a dishcloth. After supper her eldest brother went to do meditation in his room so I left him to himself. Her sister booked a massage session. She asked “had I better leave my wallet on the bedside cabinet ?” I said “you’d better not leave it on the nightstand during your massage session because someone might steal it.” My wife said “hadn’t you better leave it in your locker so that it’s safe?” Tomiko will be giving a birthday party tomorrow but alas I can’t attend since I got work to do. When she invited me at first I said “we’ll see.” Last year she got a recliner for my birthday. I said “I can’t believe you got me a recliner.” Happy birthday Tomiko. I’m sure your friends will join me in wishing you a very happy birthday 🎂

My friend Jess is a Capricorn ♑️ as well. She’s bought a house 🏡 lately. She did four days’ worth of furniture shopping for it but it’ll need a lot more work before she can move into it. She asked me about selling her original house. I said “your best bet would be to sell it this year.” This Saturday the property developer will be giving a talk on the facilities they’re planning on building for the clubhouse which is worth her attention. It’ll soak up eighty five percent of their budget. She’s a swimming champion. I can swim 🏊‍♂️ after a fashion . She easily outshines me in any swimming styles.
早晨
